summary: TWO_COLUMN: top axes has fixed BLUE f-box [-1, 1] and sliding ORANGE g_τ = g(τ-t)-box with always_redraw GREEN overlap polygon. ValueTracker τ_tr sweeps -2 → 2; bottom axes traces (f*g)(τ) as GREEN curve with YELLOW rider dot — triangle of base 4 peak 2. Live panel shows τ and current convolution value.
